title: Baking Techniques
description: Learn the fundamentals of baking, including measuring, mixing, and baking times.

steps.instruction: Preheat your oven to the required temperature.
Measure your ingredients accurately using cups and spoons.
Mix the dry ingredients separately before combining with wet ingredients.
Pour the batter into a greased baking pan.
Bake for the specified time and check for doneness with a toothpick.

safety_tips: Always use oven mitts when handling hot pans.
Keep the baking area clean to avoid cross-contamination.
Be cautious of hot surfaces and steam.
